series_metadata.series_title: State Lands Planning Studies and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These are a variety of Departmental and consultant studies conducted to determine various recreational needs and planning issues on Department of Natural Resources administered lands. They are useful for our State Comprehensive Outdoor Recreation Plan (SCORP}.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 10 years, then to State Archives to review for archive or disposal. ; Paper: Retain 10 years or until converted to electronic or microform format, then to State Archives to review for archive or disposal., Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Archives
